name: Accelerator
content_html:
Accelerator

Clone a vertical. Ship in a week.

Each VBWD demo instance is also a pre-built project kit. Fork the images, replace the CMS content, swap the brand colours — you're live on your own domain by Friday.

Clone on GitHub See what's included

What you get on day zero

Backend image

ghcr.io/vbwd-platform/vbwd_backend:latest — every core plugin bundled, migrations applied on deploy.

Front-end images

vbwd_fe_user, vbwd_fe_admin, vbwd_fe_user_plugin_api — all three ship to GHCR on every main push.

Instance template

docker-compose.instance.yml — just envsubst your instance name, ports, domain.

GitHub Actions deploy

One workflow file. Checkboxes for which instances to ship. Pulls images, rsyncs configs, restarts containers.

Seed & populate scripts

Idempotent DB seeds per plugin. Re-run any time; nothing duplicates.

Six live references

Every plugin combo is already proven on a running subdomain. Fork the one closest to your business.

A typical week-one timeline

  1. Day 1 — Fork vbwd-demo-instances, point DNS at your VPS, run setup.sh. Stack boots.
  2. Day 2 — Pick the vertical closest to your business, disable plugins you don't need, enable ones you do.
  3. Day 3 — Replace the CMS home page, about, contact. Swap the theme colour in docs/imports/theme-styles.json.
  4. Day 4 — Wire your Stripe / PayPal account in the admin. Create your real products / rooms / appointments.
  5. Day 5 — Run the Playwright smoke tests against your domain. Fix what breaks.
  6. Day 6–7 — Soft launch to a pilot group.

Extension pathways

Official plugins

Under the VBWD-platform org. Each has its own CI, own versioning, and own admin config surface.

Your own plugins

New plugin = new repo + one entry in plugins.json. No core edits needed.

Partner integrations

Work with us to list your plugin alongside the official set. Bring your own auth, storage, or payment provider.

Book a 30-minute setup call.

We'll help you decide which vertical to fork and wire up DNS together.

Schedule a call
meta_title: VBWD Accelerator — clone a vertical, ship in a week
meta_description: Six pre-built instance kits, one GitHub Actions deploy, a typical week-one timeline. Fork the closest vertical and launch.
